description: Writer should keep reference facts but omit hidden facts; continuity should enforce only operational facts.

facts.fact: The Bellwrights swear public oaths at dawn.
The city still uses the old festival calendar in private ledgers.
Maret is secretly the missing heir to the red ledger.
